case_title: FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP VS. YANYUN LI ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-06-2018 CONTINUED TO MAY-08-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) YANYUN LI.
